name: Windows VM
postCreateCommand:
#!/bin/bash
set -e

echo "========================================="
echo "📦 BƯỚC 1: CÀI ĐẶT DOCKER"
echo "========================================="
sudo apt update
sudo apt install docker.io docker-compose -y
sudo systemctl start docker
sudo systemctl enable docker

echo ""
echo "========================================="
echo "🐳 BƯỚC 2: TẢI VÀ CHẠY WINDOWS CONTAINER"
echo "========================================="

printf '%s\n' 'services:' '  windows:' '    image: dockurr/windows' '    container_name: windows' '    environment:' '      VERSION: "10"' '    devices:' '      - /dev/kvm' '      - /dev/net/tun' '    cap_add:' '      - NET_ADMIN' '    ports:' '      - "8006:8006"' '      - "3389:3389"' '    volumes:' '      - ./windows:/storage' '    restart: always' '    stop_grace_period: 2m' > docker-compose.yml && sudo mkdir -p /usr/libexec/docker && sudo ln -sf "$(command -v docker-proxy)" /usr/libexec/docker/docker-proxy && sudo docker compose up -d

echo ""
echo "========================================="
echo "✅ HOÀN TẤT! Windows đang chạy"
echo "========================================="
sleep 5
docker ps | grep windows

HOSTNAME=$(hostname)
echo ""
echo "🌐 LINK TRUY CẬP: https://${HOSTNAME}-8006.github.dev"
echo "🖥️  RDP: https://${HOSTNAME}-3389.app.github.dev"
